title: Assertion fault in row-value UPDATE
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INT, b INT, c VARCHAR(255), d FLOAT);
UPDATE t1 SET a = 99, c = 'new_text', b = (SELECT 100 FROM t1 WHERE a = 1) WHERE a = 1;
CREATE TABLE t2(e INT PRIMARY KEY, f INT NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: UPDATE statement with duplicate column assignments causes assertion fault
